jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Tanishq
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Tanishq in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tanishq:
Tanishq is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tanishq!
